title: Step 1: Toggle the button next to .

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To enable or disable **Performance Advisor**,
you must have [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project.
Users with [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add themselves to the
project as a `Project Owner`.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
**Performance Advisor** is enabled by default. To
disable or enable **Performance Advisor**:
